title: carlina lyrata
intro: Carlina lyrata, also known as the Carline Thistle or Lyrata, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Carlina lyrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, but it's recommended to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
